case_title: MARCIANO PEREZ VS. EOS RESTAURANT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,568.49 FILED BY PEREZ, MARCIANO AS TO DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, MARCIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT INC. $1,568.49 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,568.49, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER ON PETITION TO CORRECT NAME IN JUDGMENT GRANTED AS REQUESTED IN PETITION. -JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL-
